description: A conservation biologist is planning a biodiversity survey across three Central European countries. Using the boundaries for Austria, Switzerland, and Czechia provided in /home/ga/GIS_Data/european_countries.geojson, generate 5 random sampling points within each country. Ensure the resulting points layer includes 'longitude' and 'latitude' fields for each point. Export the sampling points as a GeoJSON to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sampling_points.geojson and the attribute table as a CSV to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sampling_coordinates.csv.
